refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation link availability at or above the customer-defined target throughout the operational period.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR clarifies the performance metric (link availability) and ties it explicitly to the operational period and customer-defined target, ensuring measurable and testable requirements.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure link uptime and downtime over the evaluation period using telemetry logs and compare against the customer-defined availability target.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and report link failures promptly.
FR3: Recover or mitigate link failures to maintain availability.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement redundant communication channels with automatic failover.
DP2: Real-time link health monitoring and alerting system.
DP3: Automatic link recovery protocols and fallback modes.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement redundant communication channels with automatic failover.

potential_sources: Link monitoring tightly coupled with recovery protocols
Failover mechanisms require coordination with vehicle control systems
coupling_check.notes: Redundancy and failover logic are modularized to minimize coupling; monitoring and recovery are designed as separate DPs to reduce complexity.

assumptions_risks: Risk of increased system complexity impacting maintainability.
Risk of failover delay affecting link availability.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating real-time monitoring (DP2) and recovery protocols (DP3) in subsequent decomposition levels for clarity.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Responsible for managing teleoperation link communication, redundancy, and failover mechanisms.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Physical and logical network connection used for teleoperation data exchange and redundancy management.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Sends link status and health data to NGHE Solution for monitoring and logging.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives operational commands that depend on link availability.

module_containment_scores.notes: High diffusion due to cross-cutting concerns; containment low as link management is not centralized here.
Vehicle module depends on link status but does not contain link management logic.
Primary containment of teleoperation link availability logic; low diffusion risk.
Minimal involvement; only receives alerts if link failure impacts safety.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing teleoperation link availability management within the Teleoperation module minimizes diffusion and improves maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential single point of failure if Teleoperation module is compromised.
Inter-module dependencies on link status may cause indirect coupling.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Review interface definitions to ensure clear separation of concerns and minimize cross-module dependencies.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP (redundant communication with failover) directly addresses the refined FR and supports measurable availability targets.

diffusion_risks: Cross-module dependencies on link status may increase complexity.
Failover logic must be carefully encapsulated to avoid diffusion.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Teleoperation module shows strong containment of DP with low diffusion scores, indicating good architectural packaging.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry and network link monitoring is feasible within the Teleoperation module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of link availability responsibility to Teleoperation module.

recommended_revisions: Further decompose FR into monitoring and recovery sub-FRs in next level.
Clarify interface contracts between Teleoperation and Vehicle modules.

decision.justification: While the current decomposition and assignments are sound, further refinement of sub-FRs and DPs is needed to fully capture monitoring and recovery aspects and reduce coupling risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and report link failures promptly.
FR3: Recover or mitigate link failures to maintain availability.

revise.why: To explicitly capture monitoring and recovery functions for better traceability and verification.

assumptions: Network infrastructure supports redundancy and failover.
Telemetry data is reliable and timely.
